sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f applied to options via HPR formula: HPR(T,U) = (1+f*(Z(T,U-Y)/S-1))^P(T,U). Requires empirical optimization of f parameter using historical option pricing model outputs. Parameter f is the only variable to optimize; kelly_fraction and max_drawdown_tolerance not specified by author.

source_rule_text: Position sizing for options using the Holding Period Return (HPR) formula adjusted by the optimal f parameter multiplied by the ratio of theoretical option price movements to current option price.
